name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, inefficient billing causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated dunning notifications instead of manual tracking and follow-ups via spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient management of recurring billing and dunning processes.
